name: workflow-core
description: Always-on ops/meta + the autonomous build conductor: bootstrap & manage workflow.json + .claude/settings.json, create the GitHub repo + backlog board, declare marketplaces, validate config/secrets, set the run's /goal (objective + autonomy), and drive the parameterless end-to-end build. Ships the backlog-manager agent and the git-safety + auto-loop hooks. Keep enabled across stages.
